claim: Claude Code Skills turn generic AI coding into workflow-aware tools with domain context
actionable: Create and install Claude Code Skills for your team's specific workflows and patterns

claim: Plan mode lets Claude create implementation plans and ask clarifying questions before touching code
actionable: Use plan mode (shift-tab twice) before allowing Claude to modify files

claim: Girl with Docs skill forces Claude to interrogate requirements against existing codebase patterns
actionable: Use Girl with Docs before making large refactors or adding features to unfamiliar codebases

claim: TDD workflow skill ensures Claude writes failing tests before implementation
actionable: Use TDD workflow skill to maintain test quality and coverage standards
